# Type Checking

Description of the type checking.

## Import

```js
import { is } from '@webalternatif/js-core'
```

## isWindow

[src/is.js:170-172][18]

Checks whether the given value is the global `window` object.

### Parameters

*   `o` **any** Value to test

### Examples

```javascript
isWindow(window) // true
isWindow(globalThis) // true (in browsers)
```

Returns **[boolean][2]** `true` if the value is the browser window object

## isDocument

[src/is.js:185-187][19]

Checks whether the given value is the global `document` object.

### Parameters

*   `o` **any** Value to test

### Examples

```javascript
isDocument(document) // true (in browsers)
isDocument(window.document) // true (in browsers)
isDocument({document}) // false
```

Returns **[boolean][2]** `true` if the value is the browser document object

## isDomElement

[src/is.js:199-201][20]

Checks whether the given value is a DOM Element.

### Parameters

*   `o` **any** Value to test

### Examples

```javascript
const el = document.createElement('div')
isDomElement(el) // true
```

Returns **[boolean][2]** `true` if the value is a DOM Element
